// 01 — about

Who I Am

Final-year B.Sc (Hons.) Computer Science student at Bhaskaracharya College of Applied Sciences, University of Delhi.

My experience spans software development at a fintech startup, data analysis in health-tech, and deep learning research presented at a national conference.

Actively exploring roles in Product Management, Data Analytics, and AI/ML — domains where my technical grounding and research background can drive real impact.

// 03 — experience

Where I've Worked

Software Development Intern
Aug 2024
MobiKwik · New Delhi · Fintech
  • Built a PDF-to-HTML conversion tool that improved internal document processing workflows.
  • Collaborated cross-functionally with multiple departments to integrate the tool into existing pipelines.
  • Gained hands-on HTML, CSS, and JavaScript experience in a live enterprise fintech environment.
  • Observed large-scale software deployment practices firsthand.
Data Analyst Intern
May – Jul 2024
Eykam Wellness · New Delhi · Health-Tech
  • Analyzed health and wellness datasets using Python (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn) and Excel.
  • Built automated workflows and formulas to surface actionable insights for business decisions.
  • Presented data findings clearly to non-technical stakeholders in cross-functional settings.
// 04 — research

Research & Presentations

NATIONAL CONFERENCE · IMPACT 2026
Advanced Prediction of PM2.5 Pollution Data Using Deep Learning
Co-Author & Conference Presenter · Abstract published in official conference book of proceedings
Applied deep learning techniques to environmental time-series data for predictive modeling of PM2.5 air pollution levels. Presented at IMPACT 2026, a national conference on medicinal plant value addition and innovation. Demonstrates interdisciplinary research skills — combining ML with environmental science — and is currently being extended into a full implementation.
// 05 — leadership

Positions of Responsibility

Joint Secretary, ECA Committee
BCAS · 2024–2025
Managed college-wide events, maintained Minutes of Meetings, secured sponsorships for the annual Srijan festival, and coordinated across all ECA clubs.
Secretary, Darpan (Dramatics Society)
BCAS · 2024–2025
Organized society meetings and maintained Minutes of Meetings; coordinated with other DCTC member societies for inter-college workshops and events.
Consultant, CS.net
BCAS · 2024–2025
Advised incoming office bearers on operational and strategic matters; helped organize departmental seminars and secured external sponsorships.
Joint Secretary, CS.net (Computer Science Society)
BCAS · 2023–2024
Led event management for the Computer Science Department festival; managed the society's official Instagram handle and coordinated Social Media and Tech teams.
Treasurer & PR Head, Darpan (Dramatics Society)
BCAS · 2023–2024
Managed all allocated and raised funds for the society, maintaining accurate financial records; liaised with DCTC member societies for workshops and college fests.
Social Media Coordinator, ECA Committee
BCAS · 2023–2024
Managed social media presence for the ECA Committee, coordinating content and outreach across college events and activities.
